personal.name: Alex Rivera
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
personal.bio: Passionate developer with 5+ years of experience crafting beautiful, performant web applications. I love turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly solutions. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or experimenting with digital art.
personal.tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.

projects.title: NeuralDash
projects.description: AI-powered analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, predictive insights, and customizable widget layouts. Built for enterprise teams handling petabyte-scale datasets.

projects.title: PixelForge Studio
projects.description: Browser-based creative suite for digital artists — vector illustration, pixel art, and animation tools.

experience.description: Leading the development of Next.js deployment pipelines and edge runtime features.
Built real-time collaboration systems and major product features.
